stem: A glass of orange juice provides 8% of an adult's recommended daily allowance of vitamin C. If p percent of an adult's daily allowance of vitamin C is provided by x glasses of orange juice per day, which of the following expresses p in terms of x?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. Each glass of orange juice provides 8% of the daily allowance. So x glasses provide x × 8 = 8x percent. Therefore p = 8x.

Choice A results from converting 8% to 0.8 instead of 8 in the linear relation. Choices B and D incorrectly treat the situation as exponential growth.
